body.title: Wire DickSimnel to emit on personal feed with importance flags
body.result: Dick posts lifecycle events to dicksimnel/personal with importance levels. dispatch_ticket MCP tool writes to bare device mailboxes. 19+35 tests green. Commit e8b0b3a666ffa3d16aafe5c9761329c88fee5449.
body.intention: I intend that DickSimnel posts lifecycle events (dispatch received, working, done, escalated) to its personal feed with appropriate importance levels rather than the current flat channel_event calls.
body.description:
Update DickSimnelDevice._channel_event() to post to Dick's personal feed (mailbox: dicksimnel/personal, feed_type=personal) via PgBus with importance set per event type: dispatch_received=5, working=3, done=7, escalated=7, error=9. Also fix the MCP dispatch path: add a dispatch_ticket tool to the datacenter MCP that writes to the correct bare mailbox (dicksimnel.0), not feeds/dicksimnel.0.

**Affected files:** devices/dicksimnel/device.py (_channel_event), devices/queue/mcp_server.py (new dispatch_ticket tool)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; interface logging at INFO
**Scope boundary:** IN: personal feed posts with importance, dispatch_ticket MCP tool. OUT: debug feed for ToolLoop console output (separate ticket), web UI rendering of Dick's feed.
**Completion criteria:** (1) _channel_event posts to dicksimnel/personal with importance kwarg; (2) datacenter MCP has dispatch_ticket tool that appends to bare device mailbox; (3) existing dicksimnel tests pass.
